title: Automatically updating one to many relationship in mirror column
excerpt: When I create a new line in my countries of operations table, I will add the company that I am referring to. Once I do, I would like it to update the mirrored column in the companies page that shows the array of countrie…

posts.author: nickhall (Nick)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I create a new line in my countries of operations table, I will add the company that I am referring to. Once I do, I would like it to update the mirrored column in the companies page that shows the array of countries of operation. Is there a way to trigger this on update to entity in the countries of operation page?
